subparts.text: Name 3 most significant components of any settlement/city, according to you.
Explain in 3-4 lines the difference between public and private transport.
Name 5 essential components of any street design.
What is the full form of ROW?
Explain in short the evolution of any settlement over time.
What are the 5 main components of image structure of the city according to Kevin Lynch?
Explain the road network of Delhi with respect to the hierarchy of roads as given in the Delhi Master Plan.
What is the role of Building bye-laws in settlement planning/design?
Explain some components of building bye-laws like FAR/FSI, Height and density restrictions, landuse zones etc.; and how they contribute to creation of specific urban forms?
Draw and label the cross-section of street design of any particular street width of your choice.
